comments.comment:
Reporting error, oversight. Updated Aug 8, 2017. Values updated in both 2015 and 2016 reports. Initially reported in incorrect unit (m3 vs BDT), 
Also change in on-site treatment, in 2015 40 BDT of wastewater combined biosolids were spread on agricultural land, and 217 BDT was landfilled. The practise was changed in 2016, 0 BDT was spread and 204 BDT was landfilled. 

UPDATED again Feb 3, 2020: following email correspondence with Inrp / Npri (EC) (ec.inrp-npri.ec@canada.ca) regarding QC review of data; total quantity disposed was corrected from 204t to 10.0 kg. 204t of biosolids were landfilled but as per NCASI literature 95.1% of catechol is removed in AS treatment system (therefore remaining value is 4.9% of annual landfilled biosolids total).
